languages.text: {n}Батошски наблюдает за вами, словно хищник за дичью. Тяжело вздохнув, он подбирается и скрещивает могучие руки на груди.{/n}
{n}Batoshski watches you like a predator on the hunt. With a heavy sigh, he pulls himself together and crosses his powerful arms across his chest.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Батошски наблюдает за вами, словно хищник за дичью. Тяжело вздохнув, он подбирается и скрещивает могучие руки на груди.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Batoshski watches you, like a predator on the hunt. Giving a heavy sigh, he pulls himself together and crosses his powerful arms across his chest.{/n}
{n}Batoshski watches you like a predator on the hunt. With a heavy sigh, he pulls himself together and crosses his powerful arms across his chest.{/n}

{n}Batoshski lowers his head as he watches your approach, like a predator on the hunt. You are very aware that he is assessing your every move.{/n}
"You're here. Good. Perhaps my advice about the Drover will help. Before you go to your death — get some rest and take a look around... Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."
{n}Batoshski watches you, like a predator on the hunt. Giving a heavy sigh, he pulls himself together and crosses his powerful arms across his chest.{/n}
{n}Batoshski watches you like a predator on the hunt. With a heavy sigh, he pulls himself together and crosses his powerful arms across his chest.{/n}
{n}Batoshski watches you like a predator on the hunt. With a heavy sigh, he pulls himself together and crosses his powerful arms across his chest.{/n}

languages.text:
{n}バトシュスキーは、狩りをする捕食者のように、あなたの接近を見据えながら頭を低くする。彼があなたの一挙手一投足を値踏みしているのが、はっきりとわかる。{/n}
「来たか。よし。ドローヴァーの件での私の助言が役に立つかもしれん。死地に赴く前に——少し休み、周りを見て回るといい……{mf|閣下|閣下}」
languages.original_text:
{n}Batoshski lowers his head as he watches your approach, like a predator on the hunt. You are very aware that he is assessing your every move.{/n}
"You're here. Good. Perhaps my advice about the Drover will help. Before you go to your death — get some rest and take a look around... Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

traits.locale_text:
{n}バトシュスキーは、狩りをする捕食者のように、あなたの接近を見据えながら頭を低くする。彼があなたの一挙手一投足を値踏みしているのが、はっきりとわかる。{/n}
「来たか。よし。ドローヴァーの件での私の助言が役に立つかもしれん。死地に赴く前に——少し休み、周りを見て回るといい……{mf|閣下|閣下}。」

languages.text: {n}Batoshski vous observe à la manière d'un prédateur en chasse. Avec un soupir las, il se ressaisit et croise ses bras puissants sur sa poitrine.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski watches you like a predator on the hunt. With a heavy sigh, he pulls himself together and crosses his powerful arms across his chest.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Batoshski vous observe à la manière d'un prédateur en chasse. Avec un soupir las, il se ressaisit et croise ses bras puissants sur sa poitrine.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Batoshski, avdaki bir yırtıcı misali seni izliyor. Derin bir iç çekişle kendini toparlıyor ve güçlü kollarını göğsünde kavuşturuyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski watches you like a predator on the hunt. With a heavy sigh, he pulls himself together and crosses his powerful arms across his chest.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Batoshski, avdaki bir yırtıcı misali seni izliyor. Derin bir iç çekişle kendini toparlıyor ve güçlü kollarını göğsünde kavuşturuyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Batoshski te observa como un depredador al acecho. Dejando escapar un profundo suspiro, recupera la compostura y cruza sus vigorosos brazos sobre su pecho.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski watches you like a predator on the hunt. With a heavy sigh, he pulls himself together and crosses his powerful arms across his chest.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Batoshski te observa como un depredador al acecho. Dejando escapar un profundo suspiro, recupera la compostura y cruza sus vigorosos brazos sobre su pecho.{/n}

languages.text: {n}巴托什斯基像狩猎中的捕食者一样盯着你。他沉重地叹了口气，收敛情绪，把结实的双臂抱在胸前。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski watches you like a predator on the hunt. With a heavy sigh, he pulls himself together and crosses his powerful arms across his chest.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}巴托什斯基像狩猎中的捕食者一样盯着你。他沉重地叹了口气，收敛情绪，把结实的双臂抱在胸前。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Batoshski beäugt dich wie ein Raubtier auf der Jagd. Mit einem tiefen Seufzer beherrscht er sich und verschränkt seine starken Arme vor seiner Brust.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski watches you like a predator on the hunt. With a heavy sigh, he pulls himself together and crosses his powerful arms across his chest.{/n}
